plugins.name: recomby-geo
plugins.description: Self-contained GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) plugin: 7 slash commands orchestrate the pipeline (/01-intake → /07-reaudit), 6 canonical vendored skills supply commodity capabilities (audit, content writing, schema, internal linking, keyword expansion, quality scoring), 4 JSON schemas. Zero external deps, zero API keys for the default flow. Per-client folder convention.
